title: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Varanasi is a city in Uttar Pradesh with a population of 1,500,000. The spiritual capital of India, one of the world’s oldest living cities on the Ganges River, known for its ghats and temples.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
